title: Consumer Goroutines, Cancellation, and Shutdown · Program Defense
summary: A release board compares near-miss Go and RabbitMQ decisions for consumer goroutines, cancellation, and shutdown and accepts only bounded ownership, causal evidence, and an explicit live-broker transfer gate. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a leak-resistant Go consumer lifecycle state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Track consumer tags and channel generations so stale cancellation, delivery, and close events cannot mutate current state; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Treat a closed delivery channel and consumer-cancellation notifications as lifecycle events with cause, readiness, recovery, and ownership evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Consume Registration Readiness · changed case · Quiz Consume Registration Readiness
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go messaging team handles case 8547 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to sequence consumer readiness, cancellation, handler draining, deadline, and close; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then fail the canary and prove older Go consumers remain compatible. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Shutdown Ack Policy
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Shutdown Ack Policy: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Go messaging team handles case 2976 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to sequence consumer readiness, cancellation, handler draining, deadline, and close; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Shutdown Ack Policy.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Shutdown Ack Policy, keep Shutdown Ack Policy connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Shutdown Ack Policy, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Shutdown Ack Policy precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Shutdown Ack Policy, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A quiz Go messaging team handles case 2976 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to sequence consumer readiness, cancellation, handler draining, deadline, and close; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Shutdown Ack Policy, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Acknowledging every in-flight message during shutdown prevents both loss and duplicates. In Go, closing a context automatically waits for every handler and acknowledgement to finish.
